title: Immutability.
content:
The sun must rise, the sun must set,
        Nor ever change in plan may be,
    Though dawn to stricken wretch may bring
        The hempen rope and gallows tree,
    And eventide to happy bride
        Love's crown of love in Arcady.
meaning:
Charles Hamilton Musgrove's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Immutability."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
